<!-- Generated by Ralph planning loop — do not edit manually during active loop -->

<!--
  Every task MUST have acceptance criteria. A task without criteria is incomplete
  planning — Ralph must add criteria before implementing.

  Format:
  - [ ] Task description (the work)
    - [ ] Acceptance criterion (observable behavior that proves it's correct)
    - [ ] Acceptance criterion
    - [ ] Acceptance criterion

  Example:
  - [ ] Users can register and update their profile
    - [ ] Empty form submission shows validation errors
    - [ ] Duplicate email returns clear error message
    - [ ] Users cannot change email after registration
    - [ ] Profile updates persist across sessions

  The task checkbox tracks implementation.
  The criteria checkboxes track verification.
  Both must be checked before the task is done.
-->
